headline: Best horror picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
meta_description: Need better horror picks for tonight? Here are the titles actually worth starting first, without the usual generic streaming-list fluff.
subtitle: Featuring frankenstein, Thamma, and Dont Come Home — plus more horror picks that deserve real attention.

hero_image.title: Best horror picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
hero_image.subtitle: Featuring frankenstein, Thamma, and Dont Come Home — plus more horror picks that deserve real attention.

selected_titles.title: frankenstein
selected_titles.description: A scientist creates a living creature from dead body parts, leading to tragic consequences as the monster seeks acceptance and identity.

selected_titles.title: Thamma
selected_titles.description: A chilling horror film that follows eerie supernatural events surrounding a mysterious figure known as Thamma. The story blends atmospheric tension, psychological fear, and unsettling twists that keep viewers on edge.

selected_titles.title: Dont Come Home
selected_titles.description: Dive into the eerie world where a mothers search for her vanished daughter in their ancestral home unveils chilling family secrets.

selected_titles.title: The Conjuring
selected_titles.description: Paranormal investigators help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their home.

selected_titles.title: halloween
selected_titles.description: A masked killer, Michael Myers, returns to terrorize a quiet town on Halloween night in this iconic slasher classic.

selected_titles.title: something bad is going to happen
selected_titles.description: A tense psychological thriller where a looming sense of dread builds into a chilling reality.

cta.headline: Want a custom watchlist instead of generic streaming lists?
cta.body: Message MovieJam on WhatsApp and get 3 tailored picks based on your mood, genre, and how much brainpower you want to spend tonight.

internal_link_defaults.title: How to get custom movie recs on WhatsApp
Why endless scrolling ruins movie night

style_rules: Lead with a viral, opinionated hook in the first paragraph.
Keep the same vibe as the existing MyMovieJam blog: sharp, audience-first, clean, punchy, and honest.
Write like a real viewer, not a neutral encyclopedia.
Do not fake plot details, awards, or availability.
If the CSV data is thin, make the opinion narrower instead of inventing facts.
Use the MyMovieJam visual theme and CTA style already present on the site.
SEO first, but never at the cost of sounding robotic.
Use clear subheads, quick picks, FAQs, and a strong WhatsApp CTA.
notes_for_writer: Tell the truth if the list mixes films and series.
Write as a sharp viewer with taste, not a neutral database.
Pick clear winners, easy starters, and mood-based recommendations.
Use a clear WhatsApp CTA at the end.
